# Generated by tools/m10_history.py --write; first-century disasters.
# A disaster is rooted in its named recipient country and ends with its window.

# Year of the Four Emperors; ANTIQVITAS master plan §9
antq_m10_year_four_emperors = {
	monthly_spawn_chance = monthly_spawn_chance_unique
	can_start = {
		tag = XAA
		current_date >= 68.1.1
		current_date < 70.1.1
		has_any_active_disaster = no
	}
	can_end = {
		current_date >= 70.1.1
	}
	on_start = {
		trigger_event_non_silently = antq_m10.1021
	}
}

# Vesuvius; ANTIQVITAS master plan §9
antq_m10_vesuvius = {
	monthly_spawn_chance = monthly_spawn_chance_unique
	can_start = {
		tag = XAA
		current_date >= 79.1.1
		current_date < 80.1.1
		has_any_active_disaster = no
	}
	can_end = {
		current_date >= 80.1.1
	}
	on_start = {
		trigger_event_non_silently = antq_m10.1023
	}
}
